scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @courthub/domain && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @courthub/domain && npm run dev --workspace @courthub/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/analytics-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/api-gateway && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/auth-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/booking-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/display-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/equipment-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/notification-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/payment-service && npm run typecheck --workspace @courthub/pricing-service
